name: NewsAPI
what_it_does: News aggregation API that provides access to headlines and articles from over 150,000 news sources worldwide with search and filtering capabilities.
use_cases: Monitoring news for specific topics or companies in research agents
Building news briefing and digest automation
Sentiment analysis and media monitoring workflows
Tracking breaking news for event-driven agent triggers
Competitive intelligence gathering from news sources
not_for: Full article content scraping (snippets only on most tiers)
Publishing or reproducing news content commercially
best_when: You need aggregated news search across many sources with topic/keyword filtering for research or monitoring agents.
avoid_when: You need full article text, sub-minute freshness, or commercial redistribution of news content.

auth.notes: API key as header (X-Api-Key) or query parameter. Simple single-key access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 100 requests/day, 1-month old articles, no commercial use
pricing.notes: Free tier is very restrictive. Paid tiers are expensive for what you get. The pricing jump from free to paid is steep.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests/day free; 500/day Developer; higher on Business

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors include status, code, and message fields. Common error codes well documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only API - all requests are naturally idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier prohibits commercial use - most production agents technically violate ToS
Articles are snippets, not full text - agents needing full content must scrape source URLs
Free tier limited to articles published within last 30 days
Daily rate limits (not per-minute) mean burst usage can exhaust daily quota quickly
Source availability varies - not all sources are indexed; results can have gaps
